title: Usage
lens: what / when / how much — hours, tokens, projects, models, cadence, and the per-agent split

title: Sessions & orchestration
lens: how you drive — session length, sub-agents, parallel/multi-agent use, project juggling, babysitting wait

title: Loop
lens: the inner agentic loop — tool-calls per turn, autonomy leash, the explore→edit→verify tool grammar, delegation fan-out, interrupt/re-steer cadence

title: Context
lens: what enters the window — memory weight, repeated preambles, MCP surface configured vs exercised

title: Harness
lens: the static rig — installed skills/agents/commands/MCP joined against what's actually invoked (dead config)

title: Shell & manual work
lens: what you still do by hand — shell vocabulary, session correlation, installed-vs-used tools (unused, suboptimal)

title: Forge Candidates
lens: ROLLUP — collect every section's suggestions, dedup, rank by payback, write patterns.json (the Forge tab's candidates). NOT a Profile section — the Profile is the mirror; the Forge tab owns these.
